doc.question: Today is 05/17/2008. What is the date 14 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?

<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>

<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
01/01/2015 - 2 days = 12/30/2014; 12/30/2014 + 7 days = 01/05/2015 The answer is 01/05/2015.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Tue + 6 days = Mon  ==> 01/01/2019 + 6 days = 01/07/2019 The answer is 01/07/2019.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
06/01/1943 + 1 day = 06/02/1943; 06/02/1943 - 10 = 05/23/1943 The answer is 05/23/1943.<turn|>
<|turn>user
It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
04/19/1969 + 1 day = 04/20/1969 The answer is 04/20/1969.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jane thought today is 3/11/2002, but today is in fact Mar 12, which is 1 day later. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
03/12/2002 + 1 day = 03/13/2002 The answer is 03/13/2002.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. What is the date yesterday in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
02/28/2017 - 1 day = 02/27/2017 The answer is 02/27/2017.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Today is 11/28/2018. What is the date 30 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
resps:
11/28/2018 + 30 days:
Days remaining in November: $30 - 28 = 2$ days.
Days left to count: $30 - 2 = 28$ days.
The next month is December. So, the date will be December 28, 2018.

Alternatively:
Days in November: 30. Days remaining in November: $30 - 28 = 2$.
Days left to count: $30 - 2 = 28$.
December has 31 days. So, the date is December 28, 2018.

The answer is 12/28/2018.

Alternatively:
Days in November: 30. Days remaining in November: $30 - 28 = 2$.
Days left to count: $30 - 2 = 28$.
December has 31 days. So, the date is December 28, 2018.

The answer is 12/28/2018.
